permissions.name: Manage Platform Roles
permissions.description: Create and manage platform role definitions.

permissions.name: Assign Platform Roles
permissions.description: Assign and revoke platform roles for users.

permissions.name: View Platform Users
permissions.description: View users across hospitals and inspect role mappings.

permissions.name: Review Hospital Update Requests
permissions.description: Review, approve, and reject hospital profile and integration update requests.

permissions.name: Review Hospital Offboarding Requests
permissions.description: Review, approve, and reject hospital offboarding requests.

permissions.name: Manage Hospital Roles
permissions.description: Create and manage hospital-scoped role definitions.

permissions.name: Assign Hospital Roles
permissions.description: Assign and revoke a user's hospital role.

permissions.name: Submit Hospital Update Requests
permissions.description: Submit hospital identity and integration update requests for administrative review.

permissions.name: View Hospital Update Requests
permissions.description: View update request status and review history for your hospital.

permissions.name: Request Hospital Offboarding
permissions.description: Submit hospital offboarding requests for administrative review.

permissions.name: View Hospital Staff
permissions.description: View staff profiles for the hospital.

permissions.name: Manage Hospital Staff
permissions.description: Create and manage hospital staff records and invitations.

permissions.name: Supervise Hospital Staff
permissions.description: Suspend staff, revoke invites, and perform supervisory staff operations.

permissions.name: View Resource Catalog
permissions.description: View resource catalog entries for a hospital.

permissions.name: Manage Resource Catalog
permissions.description: Create, update, and delete resource catalog entries.

permissions.name: View Hospital Inventory
permissions.description: View hospital inventory and catalog data.

permissions.name: Edit Hospital Inventory
permissions.description: Edit hospital inventory quantities and item metadata.

permissions.name: Manage Hospital Inventory
permissions.description: Manage hospital inventory lifecycle operations.

permissions.name: Supervise Hospital Inventory
permissions.description: Perform supervisory inventory controls and policy updates.

permissions.name: Import Inventory Data
permissions.description: Validate and commit inventory imports from CSV and integration pipelines.

permissions.name: View Sales Records
permissions.description: View operational sales resources and sale records.

permissions.name: Manage Sales Records
permissions.description: Create and manage operational sales records.

permissions.name: View Resource Shares
permissions.description: View resource sharing offers across hospitals.

permissions.name: Manage Resource Shares
permissions.description: Create and update resource sharing offers.

permissions.name: Supervise Resource Shares
permissions.description: Close or force-update resource sharing offers.

permissions.name: View Hospital Requests
permissions.description: View hospital resource requests.

permissions.name: Create Hospital Requests
permissions.description: Create hospital resource requests.

permissions.name: Approve Hospital Requests
permissions.description: Approve hospital resource requests.

permissions.name: Supervise Hospital Requests
permissions.description: Perform privileged request actions including cancellation and override transitions.

permissions.name: Dispatch Requests
permissions.description: Dispatch approved resource requests for transport workflows.

permissions.name: Reserve Request Inventory
permissions.description: Reserve supplier inventory for approved requests.

permissions.name: Confirm Transfers
permissions.description: Confirm transfer completion and receiving quantities.

permissions.name: Confirm Deliveries
permissions.description: Confirm request deliveries via token-based handover workflows.

permissions.name: Verify Request Returns
permissions.description: Verify request return flows and return tokens.

permissions.name: Expire Requests
permissions.description: Run request expiration workflows for overdue requests.

permissions.name: Create Share Requests (Legacy)
permissions.description: Legacy compatibility permission for creating resource share requests.

permissions.name: Approve Share Requests (Legacy)
permissions.description: Legacy compatibility permission for approving resource share requests.

permissions.name: View Inventory Batches (Legacy)
permissions.description: Legacy compatibility permission for viewing inventory batch details.

permissions.name: View Inventory Costs (Legacy)
permissions.description: Legacy compatibility permission for viewing inventory costs.

permissions.name: View Transport Operations
permissions.description: View shipment, dispatch, and transport tracking operations.

permissions.description: Create shipment and transport records.

permissions.name: Update Transport Operations
permissions.description: Update shipment status and transport operation metadata.

permissions.name: Assign Transport Resources
permissions.description: Assign riders and related transport resources.

permissions.name: Track Transport Operations
permissions.description: Add and view shipment tracking events.

permissions.name: View Hospital Communications
permissions.description: View direct and group hospital communication threads.

permissions.name: Manage Hospital Communications
permissions.description: Create conversations, send messages, and manage communication templates.

permissions.name: Supervise Hospital Communications
permissions.description: Perform supervisory communication actions including participant and template governance.

permissions.name: View Chat Conversations
permissions.description: View chat conversations, message history, and unread counters.

permissions.name: View Conversation Module
permissions.description: View communication conversations, participants, and messages.

permissions.name: View Notifications
permissions.description: View user notifications.

permissions.name: Initiate Payments
permissions.description: Initiate payment transactions for payable requests.

permissions.name: Confirm Payments
permissions.description: Confirm pending payment transactions.

permissions.name: Initiate Refunds
permissions.description: Initiate refunds for completed payment transactions.

permissions.name: Confirm Refunds
permissions.description: Confirm initiated refunds.

permissions.name: View Payment Reports
permissions.description: Access payment reporting summaries for reconciliation and audits.

permissions.name: Manage Payment Reconciliation
permissions.description: Run and manage payment reconciliation workflows.

permissions.name: View Hospital Analytics
permissions.description: View analytics and credit ledger data for the hospital.

permissions.name: Manage Hospital Broadcasts
permissions.description: Create and manage emergency broadcasts and responses.

permissions.name: View Analytics Reports
permissions.description: View platform analytics reports and aggregate trend insights.

permissions.name: View Payment Reports
permissions.description: View payment reporting dashboards and settlement summaries.

permissions.name: View Forecast Results
permissions.description: View model forecast outputs for authorized facilities.

permissions.name: View Outbreak Results
permissions.description: View model outbreak outputs for authorized facilities.

permissions.name: View ML Suggestions
permissions.description: View ML-generated request and transfer suggestions.

permissions.name: View ML Jobs
permissions.description: View ML job status, events, and result metadata.

permissions.name: Manage ML Jobs
permissions.description: Create, retry, and cancel ML orchestration jobs.

permissions.name: Manage ML Schedules
permissions.description: Create, update, activate, and deactivate ML schedules.

permissions.name: Manage ML Facility Settings
permissions.description: Manage facility-level ML thresholds and tuning settings.

permissions.name: Review ML Training Datasets
permissions.description: Review, approve, and reject generated ML training datasets.

permissions.name: Manage ML Training Jobs
permissions.description: Create and monitor ML training jobs for model lifecycle workflows.

permissions.name: Manage ML Model Versions
permissions.description: Review and approve ML model versions before activation.

permissions.description: Activate, deactivate, and rollback active prediction model versions.

permissions.name: Rollback ML Model Versions

permissions.name: View Effective Permissions
permissions.description: Inspect a user's effective permission union across all scopes.

platform_roles.description: ML engineer role for dataset review and training operations.

platform_roles.description: ML admin role for model governance and activation.
